name: lmp-label-generator
tagline: Generate professional labels in LMP format with one-click preview link (no API key)
description:
A skill that turns natural language descriptions into professional label designs using the LMP (Label Management Project) open format.

Describe the label you need — product type, size, brand, colors — and the skill generates a complete LMP JSON with proper layout zones, typography hierarchy, barcodes, and color schemes.

**Default: local only.** The skill saves the .lmp file to your Downloads folder and does not send any data to external servers unless you explicitly set config.apiEndpoint. If you set apiEndpoint (e.g. to a LabelMake Pro preview API URL), the skill will then POST the LMP to that endpoint to return a one-click designer link (no API key required for preview). Labels may contain PII; data leaves your environment only when you configure an endpoint.

Perfect for product labels, shipping labels, price tags, and any label that needs to be quickly designed and printed.
author: LabelMake Pro Team

permissions.filesystem: Write generated LMP JSON to local file (Mode A fallback when API is unavailable)
permissions.http: POST generated LMP data to user-configured preview API endpoint (Mode B one-click link, no API key)
